name: vibe-taker
description: Take it with you. Capture a feature out of one repo as a portable bundle; plant it into another and adapt to the destination stack.
author: 626Labs LLC

port.notes: Manifest mirrors the Claude Code plugin.json version. Read by vibe-taker-session-logger/vibe-taker-friction-logger for the plugin_version audit field. Antigravity discovers workflows from .agent/workflows/ and skills from .agent/skills/ — this file is a port-bookkeeping manifest, not a discovery requirement.
